# Sample Gogh Source

This fixture proves the brain can ingest raw source material, cite it,
synthesize a starter scorecard, render a report, and preserve graph
connectivity.

Domain: Giving AI coding agents good taste in frontend design using the open-source Taste Skill framework by Leon Lin — an anti-slop SKILL.md ruleset with three design dials (DESIGN_VARIANCE, MOTION_INTENSITY, VISUAL_DENSITY), audit-first redesigns, an image-first reference pipeline, anti-laziness rules, and a strict pre-flight check that make Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex produce distinctive, non-templated interfaces instead of generic AI slop.
Owner: Daniel Agrici
